content: sick spot!! love the people and the products 😁☀️

I can’t say enough good things about Twin Flame Kava. The vibe is always chill—walking in feels like stepping into a little oasis of calm. The drinks are fantastic, and I love that they offer sugar-free options for those of us watching our intake. But the real standout? Their banana kava. It’s outrageously amazing, one of the best flavors I’ve ever tried anywhere. From the owners to the kavatenders, everyone makes you feel right at home. They care about their craft and their customers. This place is it if you’re looking for a laid-back spot with top-notch kava and welcoming vibes.

If you’re looking for a laid-back hangout with a modern, upbeat vibe, Kava Point should be at the top of your list. This place brings together everything you need for a chill and enjoyable time. Whether you’re there to relax, socialize, or just try something new, Kava Point delivers on all fronts.

They offer a solid variety of kava and kratom options, perfect for anyone looking to unwind or enjoy a mellow, calming experience. For those looking for something a bit more playful, their selection of mocktails is surprisingly creative and refreshing—perfect for enjoying a night out without the buzz of alcohol.

Beyond the drinks, the atmosphere really sets this spot apart. With just the right lighting mixed with the curated music gives off a trendy, hip vibe that makes you want to stay awhile. Plus, the entertainment options are a major bonus. You can challenge your friends to a game on their air hockey table or shoot some pool on their well-maintained pool table—both of which add a fun, interactive edge to the experience.

What really surprised me was their full smoke shop inside, offering a solid range of products for those who enjoy that scene. It’s super convenient and adds another layer of versatility to what this place has to offer.

Overall, Kava Point isn’t just a spot to grab a drink—it’s a full experience. Whether you’re unwinding solo, hanging out with friends, or looking for a fun date spot, this place hits the mark with its chill energy, great drinks, and plenty of entertainment options. Definitely worth checking out!

Sunbelt Kava: A Hidden Gem in Broward County

Sunbelt Kava is one of the newest kava spots in Broward County, and it’s already making a strong impression. From the moment you walk in, the ambiance is just right: well-balanced lighting, an aesthetically pleasing design, and a clean, inviting atmosphere with a subtle, pleasant aroma. It’s the kind of place that immediately puts you at ease.

The service was top-notch, with Kavatender Dan Doon providing a warm welcome and engaging in friendly conversation. He was knowledgeable about the kava offerings and made the experience even more enjoyable.

During my visit, they had Kalo Kava on the menu, which is a rarity, according to Dan. It was one of the strongest kavas I’ve ever had, with a smooth, rich taste that stood out from many other kava blends I’ve tried. While it may not always be available, if you see it on the menu, don’t hesitate to try it!

Sunbelt Kava has all the makings of a great kava bar, relaxing vibes, excellent service, and high-quality kava. If you’re in Broward County and looking for a new spot to unwind, this place is worth checking out. I’ll be back for sure!

I deeply enjoy my time at Twin Flames. The vibes are always incredible and the food is actually great compared to other bars! Plus the banana Kava is amazing. Clara is also such an incredible kavatender. She makes everyone feel so welcomed and she's got great attention to detail, remembering everyone's name. Leticia, the owner, is also so sweet! It feels like she's welcoming you into her home. Awesome vibes here. Definitely check it out!

Review for Tribe Tea Lounge

Tribe Tea Lounge is a solid spot if you’re looking for a quiet and relaxing place to hang out or get some work done. Unlike other kava bars that blast loud music, Tribe keeps the vibe chill, making it a great spot to focus, have a conversation, or just unwind.

One of the coolest features is the big tree in the center of the bar, which adds to the relaxed atmosphere. The drinks are good, and the kavatenders are always friendly, laid-back, and quick with service. If you’re looking for a low-key, comfortable kava bar, Tribe is definitely worth checking out.

Chillers Kava & Coffee may be a small bar, but it left a big impression on me. I ordered the Bananas Foster kava drink, and I can’t even put into words how good it was—absolutely delicious!\n\nThe vibe here is super chill, making it a great spot to relax and enjoy a quality drink. The atmosphere is inviting, and you can tell they put a lot of care into their menu. I’ll definitely be coming back for more. Highly recommend checking this place out!

We visited The Hideout Kava & Tea in Boynton Beach for the first time on a Friday night, and it was an experience worth sharing. The place was packed, with a dimly lit, cozy atmosphere that gave it a chill yet lively vibe. The energy was definitely bumping, making it feel like a true community spot where regulars and newcomers alike could enjoy the night.

One of the standout features (and often missed) was the seating—super comfortable, perfect for settling in and unwinding. But the real highlight? The teas were extra strong, delivering exactly what you’d want from a solid kava bar. Whether you’re there to relax or get social, their drinks hit just right.

Another bonus was the pool tables, adding a fun, laid-back element to the space. It’s always a plus when a kava bar offers more than just good drinks, and The Hideout nails it with the mix of great ambiance, quality beverages, and entertainment.

Overall, if you’re looking for a vibrant, welcoming kava spot with strong tea, a great crowd, and a comfortable setup, The Hideout Kava & Tea should definitely be on your list. We’ll be back for sure!
